name: whatsapp-relay
description: Link a local WhatsApp account, read recent messages from volatile memory, and send text with URL previews disabled.

interface.longDescription: A reduced WhatsApp relay for local QR authentication, bounded in-memory message reading, chat lookup, and explicit text sending. It does not let WhatsApp control Codex or persist message bodies.
defaultPrompt: Link my WhatsApp account and verify the auth status
Find a WhatsApp contact or group by name
Read recent messages from a WhatsApp chat
Send an explicit WhatsApp text message to a contact or group
